title: psilochenia monticola
intro: Psilochenia monticola, also known as the Mountain Goldensnakewort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Boraginaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Psilochenia monticola include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin, as well as reduce swelling and pain. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are applied topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
